description: Reproduce the NREL Phase VI 2-bladed rotor in QBlade and predict its performance. Import the S809 airfoil from /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/s809.dat, generate a polar for Re=1,000,000, and extrapolate it to 360 degrees. Design the 2-bladed HAWT rotor with a radius of approximately 5.029m and a tip pitch of 3 degrees using the standard NREL Phase VI chord and twist distribution. Run a BEM simulation at a wind speed of 7 m/s and a rotational speed of 72 RPM. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/nrel_phase6.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/nrel_phase6_report.txt containing the predicted Mechanical Power (W), Cp, and TSR.
